public_modules.name: build-image-combination-queue
public_modules.purpose: Build auditable, deduplicated image-production queues and explicit batches.

public_modules.name: control-image-generation-receipts
public_modules.purpose: Reconcile local images, receipts, hashes, prompts, retries, and blocks.

public_modules.name: build-image-review-gallery
public_modules.purpose: Build local UTF-8 HTML review galleries with grouping and image-load checks.

public_modules.name: finalize-image-production
public_modules.purpose: Reconcile final delivery artifacts and retain unresolved exceptions.

excluded_from_public_release: real queues, prompts, generated images, receipts, and test outputs
project-specific operational evidence and local paths
release_boundary: Each module is independently usable. Combining them is optional; no public module is an autonomous publishing or image-generation system.
notice: See NOTICE.md for source attribution, responsible-use expectations, and AI-use guidance.
